docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $679.95 FILED BY YANOVSKY, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT EMERCHANT CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-05-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ARBITRATION DENIED. DEFENDANT'S CHALENGE TO VENUE DENIED. CASE CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 5, 2008 AT 3:30 PM. FOR TRIAL. IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPEARANCE, DEFENDANT MAY SUBMIT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE TO THE COURT IN ADVANCE OF HEARING, AND APPEAR BY TELEPHONE FOR TRIAL. THE CLERK OF THE COURT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH INFORMATION PERTAINING TO APPEARANCE BY TELEPHONE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED BY TELEPHONE, AS PERMITTED BY THE COURT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE GRANTED, INSTRUCTIONS SENT TO PARTY.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANOVSKY, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMERCHANT CLUB $590.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $672.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NAME ON PROOF IS ONLY MERCHANT CLUB SERVED JUN-16-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EMERCHANT CLUB
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT. REQUEST TO DISMISS CASE AND FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. NOTICE REGARDING CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANOVSKY, EDWARD HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT EMERCHANT CLUB
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMERCHANT CLUB APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. JILL AUSIE OF EMERCHANT VERBALLY STIPULATES TO HAVING JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL HEAR CASE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY EDWARD YANOVSKY IS GRANTED.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
